lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Third consecutive bar-raise, third identical set of findings, zero movement. Both operational HIGHs (the committed-and-ungitignored Discord webhook in scripts/.discord_webhook.txt, and write-dashboard-status.ps1:98-105 still hardcoding barRaise.* = null so the next release wipes the dashboard verdict) are still open. No commits since 505bfda (v0.3.0, 2026-05-26); the dirty tree is the same four files as yesterday, none touching a carried action. Verdict steps down from at-risk to stalled: the findings are one-line fixes that have sat untouched for a full review cycle, so the audit-to-fix loop, not the findings, is now the story. One v0.3.1 patch clears the board. Product itself remains healthy.
